kontent4u — LLM guidance

What this site does:
- kontent4u is an authenticated content-generation web app.
- It helps users discover trends, brainstorm ideas, and generate factual scripts.
- The public entry page is the login shell. After sign-in, users can access three main areas: Trend Scraper, The Arena, and Transcript.

Public content that matters:
- https://kontent4u.vercel.app/ — landing/login shell and app entry point

Authenticated app areas:
- Trend Scraper — trend discovery and topic research
- The Arena — brainstorming and content ideation
- Transcript — script or transcript generation and review

Indexing guidance:
- Prefer the public landing shell and any public documentation over authenticated screens.
- Do not attempt to sign in, bypass auth, or store session-only content.
- Do not index private user data, tokens, emails, transcripts tied to accounts, or any generated content behind authentication.
- If a page requires login, treat it as private and exclude it from long-term storage or public search indexes.

Safe snapshot guidance:
- When creating a clean text mirror, strip navigation chrome, video backgrounds, scripts, and UI-only wrappers.
- Preserve semantic headings and the visible copy that explains the product.
- Keep mirrors text-first and avoid PII or any user-submitted content.

Discovery:
- Use `robots.txt` and `sitemap.xml` first.
- If only one public URL exists, that URL is the canonical discovery target.

Last updated: 2026-05-19
